ddls:
CREATE TABLE "policy_renewals" (
  "renewal_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each policy renewal */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Date of the policy renewal */,
  "renewal_type" TEXT /* Type of the policy renewal (e.g., ANNUAL, SEMI-ANNUAL) */,
  "agreement_id" TEXT /* Reference to the agreement associated with the renewal */,
  "application_id" TEXT /* Reference to the application associated with the renewal */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who owns the policy */,
  "premium_amount" TEXT /* Premium amount for the renewal */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment for the renewal (e.g., CREDIT_CARD, BANK_TRANSFER) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of payment for the renewal */,
  "renewal_status" TEXT /* Status of the renewal (e.g., PENDING, PAID, OVERDUE) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("renewal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_renewals_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_renewals_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_renewals_agreement_id FOREIGN KEY ("agreement_id") REFERENCES agreements ("agreement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agreements" (
  "agreement_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each agreement */,
  "agreement_type" TEXT /* Type of the agreement (e.g., POLICY, ENDORSEMENT) */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the agreement becomes effective */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the agreement terminates */,
  "policy_id" TEXT /* Reference to the policy associated with the agreement */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who is party to the agreement */,
  "terms_and_conditions" TEXT /* Terms and conditions of the agreement */,
  "signed_date" TEXT /* Date the agreement was signed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agreement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agreements_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agreements_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "application_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the application was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the application (e.g., PENDING, APPROVED, REJECTED) */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who submitted the application */,
  "policy_id" TEXT /* Reference to the policy for which the application is made */,
  "required_documents" TEXT /* List of required documents for the application */,
  "submitted_documents" TEXT /* List of submitted documents for the application */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policies" (
  "policy_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each policy */,
  "policy_type" TEXT /* Type of the policy (e.g., LIFE, AUTO, HOME) */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date the policy was issued */,
  "maturity_date" TEXT /* Date the policy matures */,
  "coverage_amount" TEXT /* Coverage amount of the policy */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who owns the policy */,
  "premium_rate" TEXT /* Premium rate for the policy */,
  "deductible_amount" TEXT /* Deductible amount for the policy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "renewal_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "renewal_id" TEXT /* ID of the policy renewal the log entry is associated with */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., RENEWED, MODIFIED, CANCELLED) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was performed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_renewal_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_renewal_logs_renewal_id FOREIGN KEY ("renewal_id") REFERENCES policy_renewals ("renewal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., ADMIN, AGENT, CUSTOMER) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "renewal_id" TEXT /* ID of the policy renewal the audit entry is associated with */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., CREATED, UPDATED, DELETED) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was performed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Details of the changes made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_renewal_id FOREIGN KEY ("renewal_id") REFERENCES policy_renewals ("renewal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
